steps.expected: Edit form loads with existing values
steps.observed: Form loaded with title, URI, WYSIWYG HTML content, display=Yes, keywords, order=7, category g9edit_cat_old checked, and author g9edit_author_1773939132 (ID 3).

evidence.network: Form data loaded in UI; agent-browser request export was limited for this page load.

steps.action: Change title to g9edit_article_title_updated_1773939132 and submit
steps.expected: Title updates, modified timestamp updates, redirect remains edit page with success state
steps.observed: Title field and DB row updated; article_modified changed from 1773939032 to 1773939223; URL remained /admin/articles/19/edit.

evidence.network: UI submit completed successfully; DB verification captured in db-final-state.json.

steps.action: Uncheck g9edit_cat_old_1773939132 and check g9edit_cat_new_1773939132, then submit
steps.expected: Old category relation removed and new relation added
steps.observed: UI checkbox state updated after save; article2cat changed from category_id_rel=20 to category_id_rel=21.

evidence.network: UI submit completed successfully; junction verification done via sqlite query and db-final-state.json.

steps.action: Clear Title and submit edit form
steps.expected: Validation error shown and article not modified
steps.observed: Validation text "Title is required" shown; DB remained unchanged at title g9edit_article_title_1773939132 and modified 1773939032 for that attempt.

evidence.network: Client-side validation prevented invalid save; no server-side change observed.

steps.observed: Author field updated to g9edit_authorb_1773939284 with ID: 4; persisted to DB (article_author=4) after save.

evidence.network: Browser performance entries recorded fetches to /api/admin/users/search; supplemental curl GET /api/admin/users/search?q=g9edit_authorb -> 200 (network-statuses.txt).

assertions.title: Edit article — URI can be changed

steps.action: Change URI to g9edit_article_uri_updated_1773939132 and save
steps.observed: URI field and DB article_uri updated to g9edit_article_uri_updated_1773939132.

evidence.network: UI save succeeded; DB evidence in db-final-state.json.

assertions.title: Upload attachment on article edit

steps.action: Choose g9edit_attachment_source.txt, set attachment title, click Upload on edit form
steps.expected: New attachment row appears and file/DB record is created
steps.observed: UI remained at "No attachments yet" and no attachments row was created in DB for article_id=19.

evidence.network: No attachment POST request was observed from the UI flow; supplemental API check shows endpoint works (POST /api/admin/articles/19/attachments -> 201 via curl, network-statuses.txt).

assertions.issues: Attachment upload action on edit form did not create a record/file through the UI despite file selection.

steps.action: Open edit form with one namespaced attachment row present
steps.expected: Table shows Title, File, Type, Size, Delete with correct values
steps.observed: Table rendered headers [Title, File, Type, Size, Delete] and row values g9edit_manual_title_1773939132 / g9edit_manual_attach_1773939132.txt / text/plain / 53 B.

evidence.network: Delete button action endpoint available for listed row; table values validated in DOM and screenshot.

steps.expected: Attachment row removed, DB row deleted, file removed, remain on edit form
steps.observed: Row disappeared from UI, attachments table cleared, DB contains no attachments for article_id=19, file removed from app/uploads/19, URL remained /admin/articles/19/edit.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request export was inconsistent for this SPA; request lists were often empty.
frictions.resolution: Used browser performance resource entries and supplemental authenticated curl traces saved to evidence files.

frictions.description: Edit-page attachment upload via UI did not create any attachment record/file even when a file was selected.
frictions.resolution: Marked VAL-ART-051 as fail; used a namespaced seeded attachment only to validate VAL-ART-052 and VAL-ART-053 independently.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 8 passed, 1 failed (VAL-ART-051 upload on edit). Non-pass reason: UI upload attempt did not create attachment row/file; endpoint itself responded 201 in supplemental API check.
